backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages pairing codes, recipients, and messages using two maps; exposes functions to create pairing codes, register recipients, send messages, poll messages, and list all pairing codes.
backend/migration.mo: Minimal migration module with a no-op `run` function that passes state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two features—drawing canvas on the Sender page and drawing/text detection on the Recipient page—to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and OKLCH CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, border, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO, Open Graph, PWA, and mobile meta tags, loading the React app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home (`/`), Sender (`/sender`), and Recipient (`/recipient`), wrapped in a shared Layout with a dark-themed Toaster.
frontend/src/components/DrawingCanvas.ts: Freehand drawing canvas component with mouse/touch support, color swatches, and stroke size controls; exposes `getDataURL()` and `isEmpty()` via a forwarded ref for parent consumption.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper providing a dark-themed shell with a flexible main area and a branded footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for all backend operations: creating pairing codes, sending messages, polling messages every 3 seconds, registering recipients, and fetching all pairing codes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark-first OKLCH color palette with custom tokens (neon, electric, surface) plus utility classes for widget text and glow shadows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page where users choose to be a Sender (enter a pairing code) or Recipient (generate a pairing code via backend), then navigate to the respective page.
frontend/src/pages/Recipient.tsx: Recipient/widget page that registers a pairing code, polls for incoming messages, and renders either plain text or a drawing image payload in a full-screen widget layout.
frontend/src/pages/Sender.tsx: Sender page that lets users enter a pairing code and compose either a text message or a freehand drawing (via DrawingCanvas), then send the payload to the paired recipient.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts (Space Grotesk, Inter), border radii, glow box shadows, and animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking schema version, feature history (sender/recipient pages, theming, drawing canvas, live promotion), architectural notes, and known issues for the remote text widget app.
